module.name: theorem
module.description: A numbered theorem / lemma / definition / corollary box with a coloured accent. Body = the statement (Markdown + math).
module.aiSpec:
A THEOREM-style environment for maths/CS slides — a labelled, numbered, accented box holding a statement. Block module: the body is the statement (Markdown, and inline \(math\) / display \[math\] both render). Params: `kind` — one of theorem, lemma, definition, corollary, proposition, example, remark (default theorem; theorem-like kinds set the body italic, definition/example/remark stay upright); `number` — free text like 1 or 2.3 (default empty = unnumbered); `title` — optional name shown in parentheses; `color` — accent colour (default var(--accent-color)). Header reads e.g. "Theorem 2 (Pythagoras)."
<!-- @theorem kind: theorem, number: 1, title: Pythagoras --> For a right triangle, \(a^2 + b^2 = c^2\). <!-- @end -->

param.name: kind
param.label: Kind
param.desc: Environment name shown in the header; theorem-like kinds render the body in italics.

param.name: number
param.label: Number
param.desc: Free-form number such as 1 or 2.3 (empty = unnumbered).

param.name: title
param.label: Title (optional)
param.desc: Optional name shown in parentheses after the number, e.g. Pythagoras.

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Colour of the left border, header text and box tint.

snippet.label: Theorem box
snippet.text: <!-- @theorem kind: theorem, number: 1, title: Pythagoras --> For a right triangle with legs \(a, b\) and hypotenuse \(c\), \[ a^2 + b^2 = c^2. \] <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Numbered theorem/lemma/definition box; body is the statement (math renders).
